hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
from datetime import datetime, timezone
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    tool = data.get('tool_name', '')
    inp = json.dumps(data.get('tool_input', {}))[:500]
    out = json.dumps(data.get('tool_response', {}))[:500]
    ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
    entry = json.dumps({'tool': tool, 'input': inp, 'output': out, 'timestamp': ts})
    os.makedirs('logs', exist_ok=True)
    open('logs/session.jsonl', 'a').write(entry + '\\n')
except: pass
" 2>/dev/null || true
